channel.title: The Cloudflare Blog
channel.description: Get the latest news on how products at Cloudflare are built, technologies used, and join the teams helping to build a better Internet.

item.title: 【Toxic combinations: when small signals add up to a security incident】有毒组合：当小信号累积起来导致安全事件时
item.description: 【 Minor misconfigurations or request anomalies often seem harmless in isolation. But when these small signals converge, they can trigger a security incident known as a toxic combination. Here’s how to spot the signs. 】轻微的配置错误或请求异常通常看起来是无害的。但当这些小信号汇聚在一起时，它们可能会引发被称为有毒组合的安全事件。以下是如何发现这些迹象。

item.title: 【We deserve a better streams API for JavaScript】我们应该有一个更好的 JavaScript 流 API
item.description: 【 The Web streams API has become ubiquitous in JavaScript runtimes but was designed for a different era. Here's what a modern streaming API could (should?) look like. 】Web 流 API 在 JavaScript 运行时中已经无处不在，但它是为不同的时代而设计的。这是现代流 API 可能（应该？）的样子。

item.title: 【ASPA: making Internet routing more secure】ASPA：使互联网路由更加安全
item.description: 【 ASPA is the cryptographic upgrade for BGP that helps prevent route leaks by verifying the path network traffic takes. New features in Cloudflare Radar make tracking its adoption easy. 】ASPA 是 BGP 的加密升级，可通过验证网络流量所采用的路径来帮助防止路由泄漏。 Cloudflare Radar 的新功能使跟踪其采用情况变得容易。

item.title: 【Bringing more transparency to post-quantum usage, encrypted messaging, and routing security】为后量子使用、加密消息传递和路由安全带来更多透明度
item.description: 【 Cloudflare Radar has added new tools for monitoring PQ adoption, KT logs for messaging, and ASPA routing records to track the Internet's migration toward more secure encryption and routing standards. 】Cloudflare Radar 添加了用于监控 PQ 采用情况的新工具、用于消息传递的 KT 日志以及 ASPA 路由记录，以跟踪互联网向更安全的加密和路由标准的迁移。

item.title: 【The most-seen UI on the Internet? Redesigning Turnstile and Challenge Pages】互联网上最常见的用户界面？重新设计十字转门和挑战页面
item.description: 【 We serve 7.6 billion challenges daily. Here’s how we used research, AAA accessibility standards, and a unified architecture to redesign the Internet’s most-seen user interface. 】我们每天应对 76 亿个挑战。以下是我们如何利用研究、AAA 可访问性标准和统一架构来重新设计互联网最常见的用户界面。

item.title: 【How we rebuilt Next.js with AI in one week】我们如何在一周内用 AI 重建 Next.js
item.description: 【 One engineer used AI to rebuild Next.js on Vite in a week. vinext builds up to 4x faster, produces 57% smaller bundles, and deploys to Cloudflare Workers with a single command. 】一位工程师使用 AI 在一周内在 Vite 上重建了 Next.js。 vinext 的构建速度提高了 4 倍，生成的捆绑包体积缩小了 57%，并通过单个命令部署到 Cloudflare Workers。

item.title: 【Cloudflare One is the first SASE offering modern post-quantum encryption across the full platform】Cloudflare One 是第一个在整个平台上提供现代后量子加密的 SASE
item.description: 【 We’ve upgraded Cloudflare One to support post-quantum encryption by implementing the latest IETF drafts for hybrid ML-KEM into our Cloudflare IPsec product. This extends post-quantum encryption across all major Cloudflare One on-ramps and off-ramps. 】我们将混合 ML-KEM 的最新 IETF 草案实施到我们的 Cloudflare IPsec 产品中，从而升级了 Cloudflare One 以支持后量子加密。这将后量子加密扩展到所有主要的 Cloudflare One 入口和出口。

item.title: 【Cloudflare outage on February 20, 2026】Cloudflare 于 2026 年 2 月 20 日中断
item.description: 【 Cloudflare suffered a service outage on February 20, 2026. A subset of customers who use Cloudflare’s Bring Your Own IP (BYOIP) service saw their routes to the Internet withdrawn via Border Gateway Protocol (BGP). 】Cloudflare 于 2026 年 2 月 20 日遭遇服务中断。使用 Cloudflare 自带 IP (BYOIP) 服务的部分客户发现他们的互联网路由通过边界网关协议 (BGP) 被撤回。

item.title: 【Code Mode: give agents an entire API in 1,000 tokens】代码模式：以 1,000 个代币为代理提供完整的 API
item.description: 【 The Cloudflare API has over 2,500 endpoints. Exposing each one as an MCP tool would consume over 2 million tokens. With Code Mode, we collapsed all of it into two tools and roughly 1,000 tokens of context. 】Cloudflare API 拥有超过 2,500 个端点。将每个工具公开为 MCP 工具将消耗超过 200 万个代币。通过代码模式，我们将所有内容折叠成两个工具和大约 1,000 个上下文标记。

item.title: 【Shedding old code with ecdysis: graceful restarts for Rust services at Cloudflare】通过 ecdysis 摆脱旧代码：Cloudflare 的 Rust 服务优雅重启
item.description: 【 ecdysis is a Rust library enabling zero-downtime upgrades for network services. After five years protecting millions of connections at Cloudflare, it’s now open source. 】ecdysis 是一个 Rust 库，可实现网络服务的零停机升级。五年来保护了 Cloudflare 的数百万个连接，现在它已开源。
